label: Biome fish types
description: Defines the fish populations available in a biome, split into freshwater and saltwater categories at common and uncommon tiers, plus an optional rare-catches set maker.

freshwater_Common.label: Freshwater common
freshwater_Common.description: Common freshwater fish. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the catch chance.

saltwater_Common.label: Saltwater common
saltwater_Common.description: Common saltwater fish. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the catch chance.

freshwater_Uncommon.label: Freshwater uncommon
freshwater_Uncommon.description: Uncommon freshwater fish. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the catch chance.

saltwater_Uncommon.label: Saltwater uncommon
saltwater_Uncommon.description: Uncommon saltwater fish. Each element name is the ThingDef defName; scalar text is the catch chance.

rareCatchesSetMaker.label: Rare catches set maker
rareCatchesSetMaker.description: ThingSetMakerDef used to generate rare fishing catches for this biome.
